name: Rindle
concept: A plump, upright citrus-slice creature whose thick pith-and-rind border doubles as a cosy hooded coat, wearing the permanently smug half-lidded expression of someone who knows they are the freshest thing in the room.
imagePrompt:
A die-cut vinyl sticker of an original chibi creature called Rindle: a plump, upright citrus slice come to life, standing squarely and facing the viewer, full body, one single connected shape.

SILHOUETTE: a fat, slightly egg-shaped circle — a whole orange slice stood on end — with two short stubby legs and two little rounded flipper-arms bulging out from the sides. Head and body are the same single citrus disc (no neck); the creature IS the slice. The outer edge is a thick, chunky rind band that wraps all the way around the disc, and it reads like a snug hooded coat: the rind swells and thickens at the top into a soft rounded hood-brim that overhangs the face, then tapers down the sides and thickens again at the bottom into a rolled hem the body sits inside. Silhouette must be clean, closed, bold and instantly readable — no gaps, no floating pieces, no wisps.

MATERIALS AND FINISH: commit hard to the sticker look. Thick uniform die-cut white vinyl border (chunky, generous, evenly offset) around the whole creature, with a subtle drop shadow just inside it. Flat cel-shaded vector fills, no gradients except a single glossy laminate sheen: one broad soft-edged white highlight arcing across the upper-left of the body and a smaller one on the hood-brim, exactly like light on a laminated sticker. Bold, confident ink outline in warm burnt-umber (never pure black), thick and slightly varied in weight, plus clean interior line work. Everything crisp and chunky — no detail finer than a fat brushstroke.

PALETTE: one bold hero colour with warm supports. Flesh: juicy tangerine-coral (#FF8A3D) with lighter creamsicle wedge centres (#FFC97A). Rind coat: sunny mandarin (#FFB03A) on the outside with an inner ring of soft pith cream (#FFF3D9) that acts as the coat's fleece lining. Pips: deep cocoa brown (#4A2C1A) with one glossy dot highlight each. One accent: a single thick, rounded leaf in fresh mint-green (#5FBF6B), broad and chubby like a felt shape, tucked flat against the top of the hood and fully attached, with one bold central vein.

INTERIOR DESIGN: the citrus wedges radiate from just below the face down across the belly like a plump ribbed vest, separated by soft cream pith walls; the wedges are chunky and rounded at the tips, five or six at most, big and legible. One wedge — lower right of the belly — is a shade deeper coral than the others, a little beauty mark.

FACE: enormous, honest, glossy eyes set low and wide on the disc, large dark cocoa ovals with big white catchlights and a small secondary sparkle, drawn half-lidded with a lazy upper lid — the look of someone extremely pleased with themselves. THE ONE IDEA: a single glossy teardrop-shaped pip (seed) sits embedded in the flesh above the right eye, tilted at a jaunty angle so it reads permanently as one cocked, knowing eyebrow — this is the creature's whole personality in one shape. A second pip sits low on the left cheek like a mole. Tiny rounded snub of a nose, and a small crisp asymmetric smirk curving up higher on one side, with a soft coral blush oval on each cheek. Expression: bright, sharp, smug, and completely lovable.

PROPORTIONS: chunky and huggable — body about two-and-a-half times the height of the little legs, arms short and soft, everything rounded, weighty and soft-cornered, nothing pointy or spindly. Symmetrical standing pose, arms relaxed slightly out from the sides, feet planted.

No text, no symbols, no detached particles, sparks, juice droplets or motes — every element must touch the body.
